executive_summary: Latest updates from 5 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 5 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: UAE arrests dozens of British citizens over online posts during Iran war. Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's Kharg Island, energy sites. Iran-Israel war LIVE: Trump again warns Iran to open Strait of Hormuz. Keir Starmer says UK will not be 'dragged' into Iran war. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: UAE arrests dozens of British citizens over online posts during Iran war
key_developments.detail: Dozens of British citizens have been jailed in the United Arab Emirates as the country clamps down on social media activity over the Iran war . key_developments.headline: Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's Kharg Island, energy sites
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump has threatened to "obliterate" Iran's energy infrastructure, including power plants, oil wells and Kharg Island, if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. key_developments.headline: Keir Starmer says UK will not be 'dragged' into Iran war
key_developments.detail: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has ruled out deploying troops to Iran, saying the UK is "not going to get dragged into this war.” Starmer said that the UK would still take “defensive action” to protect “British lives, British interests and, of course, our allies in the region” and continue effo

key_developments.headline: Homes damaged as Iranian missiles trigger sirens across northern Israel
key_developments.detail: Homes damaged as Iranian missiles trigger sirens across northern Israel Missile debris from Iranian launches struck parts of central and northern Israel, damaging multiple areas.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Homes damaged as Iranian missiles trigger sirens across northern Israel Missile debris from Iranian launches struck parts of central and northern Israel, damaging multiple areas.

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
